subject: Pearly -> Zephyrous: PR 108 Sonar duplication triage
body: Sub-director delegation. Please own the PR 108 Sonar duplication-density triage for the quality-gate lane. Current Sonar state: gate ERROR because new_duplicated_lines_density is 5.9 percent over the 3 percent threshold; search_duplicated_files reports 54 duplicated files, including generated SDK outputs and agent-tools/test surfaces. Please identify the top actionable duplication contributors, separate generated-code policy questions from practical source/test refactors, and return the smallest path to get the gate below threshold. Read-only unless I route an implementation claim.
